name: German Pepper Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk egg and granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Sift flour, salt, cinnamon, white pepper, mixed spice, cornstarch, and baking powder into the egg mixture. Add lemon peel and candied peel and stir well.
3. Chill the dough for 1 hour.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease several baking sheets lightly.
5. Form the dough into 16 small balls and place them well apart on the baking sheets.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes or until well risen and lightly golden.
7. Cool on a wire rack.
8. Sprinkle with powdered sugar, if desired. Store several days before serving to allow time for flavors to mellow.
